title: TimeLines
description: a mod for traveling in time for Minecraft, but the future is not yet complete, only the past
body:
This is a time travel mod for Minecraft, which adds the past and the future. I would like to point out that the future and the past do not represent any specific eras (for example, there are no dinosaurs in the past, and there are no flying cars in the future), but rather represent the author's interpretation of Minecraft in different time periods. Going back to the mod, it will add new items to the game, one of which is a time artifact that allows you
![artifact and clocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5750fa06393c249a1f8714215815c411de17c323_0.webp)
to travel back in time and return to the present. There is also a time clock that allows you to travel purely to the future and return to the present, as well as a modified time clock that allows you to travel to the future, past, and present. To choose where to travel, press Shift + Right-Click. I also want to mention that the future is not yet ready, but the mod will continue to be updated and eventually released.
![zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb41dbc34ef2b524c71fcf45836fae979bc4171c_0.webp)
![pig](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92379eb8cfac0aebd0389850bf2a6af2b19a6fa1_0.webp)
![past](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/919ad2bc1d7658edf8a4cf4dd96f45e091ff73d4_0.webp)
it also requires a geckolib for now
**also discord only for russians**
